tasks.title: Set up project structure and dependencies
tasks.description:
Initialize the Node.js project with package.json, install Express, install test dependencies (Jest + Supertest), configure scripts, and set up ESLint/Prettier if desired.

Acceptance criteria:
- package.json exists with correct scripts (start, test)
- Express, Jest, and Supertest are listed as dependencies/devDependencies
- Project runs without errors

Estimated: 15 minutes

tasks.title: Implement in-memory Todo data store
tasks.description:
Create a simple in-memory data store (array/map) for todos with CRUD helper functions: getAll, getById, create, update, delete.

Acceptance criteria:
- todos.js (or todos.ts) module exports the CRUD helpers
- Each todo has: id (auto-increment or UUID), title (string), completed (boolean), createdAt (ISO timestamp)
- All helpers work correctly in isolation

Estimated: 20 minutes

tasks.title: Implement Todo REST API routes
tasks.description:
Create Express router with the following endpoints:
- GET    /todos         – list all todos
- GET    /todos/:id     – get single todo
- POST   /todos         – create a new todo
- PUT    /todos/:id     – update a todo (title / completed)
- DELETE /todos/:id     – delete a todo

Acceptance criteria:
- All routes return correct HTTP status codes (200, 201, 404, 400)
- Response bodies are JSON
- 404 returned when todo not found

Estimated: 30 minutes

tasks.title: Wire up Express app entry point
tasks.description:
Create app.js (Express app config + router mounting) and server.js (HTTP listen). Separate app from server to make testing easier.

Acceptance criteria:
- app.js exports the Express app
- server.js starts the HTTP server on a configurable port (default 3000)
- JSON body parsing middleware is applied
- `npm start` launches the server

Estimated: 15 minutes

tasks.title: Write unit tests for the data store
tasks.description:
Use Jest to unit-test the in-memory store helpers: create, read, update, delete, and edge cases (not-found).

Acceptance criteria:
- At least one test per CRUD operation
- Edge cases: get/update/delete non-existent id returns null/undefined
- All tests pass with `npm test`

Estimated: 20 minutes

tasks.title: Write integration tests for the REST API
tasks.description:
Use Jest + Supertest to integration-test all REST endpoints against the Express app.

Acceptance criteria:
- Tests cover: list todos, create todo, get by id, update todo, delete todo
- Tests cover 404 responses for missing ids
- Tests cover 400 responses for invalid input
- All tests pass with `npm test`

Estimated: 30 minutes

tasks.title: Add input validation and error handling middleware
tasks.description:
Add request validation (title must be non-empty string) and a global error-handling middleware that returns structured JSON errors.

Acceptance criteria:
- POST /todos with missing/empty title returns 400 with descriptive message
- Unhandled errors return 500 with JSON body (no stack trace in production)
- Existing tests still pass

Estimated: 20 minutes
